channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Can’t Seriously Believe ID Requirements Are Civil Rights Violations
item.description: Democrats do not want the specious nature of their charge of racism to be revealed, let alone adjudicated.

item.title: Trump envoy Witkoff and Jared Kushner in Geneva for closely watched Iran negotiations
item.description: Oman’s Foreign Minister Sayyid Badr bin Hamad Al Busaidi meets Trump envoy Steve Witkoff in Geneva as U.S. and Iran exchange proposals on Tehran’s nuc...

item.title: ‘I sell millions of Halloween costumes to Americans. Mr. President—here’s my takeaway from the wild tariffs ride’
item.description: Why President Trump's tariffs may not be the boon to reshoring he imagines.

item.title: Self-Obsessed ‘Looksmaxxing’ Culture Subverts Traditional Masculinity
item.description: Consider what other ideologies aim to dissociate a person from their body to the point of physical mutilation.

item.title: Newark mayor: ICE operation caused multi-vehicle crash
item.description: A car chase involving federal immigration enforcement officers led to a muti-vehicle crash Wednesday in Newark, New Jersey, city officials said.

item.title: Nvidia’s record quarter and what it signals for CFOs: ‘Compute equals revenue’
item.description: As hyperscalers pour billions into AI, Nvidia’s results offer a new benchmark for capital spending on compute.

item.title: Fetterman hailed Trump's SOTU speech as 'powerful' for honoring veterans as other Dems were more critical
item.description: Trump delivered the longest State of the Union in U.S. history at 1 hour 48 minutes, drawing praise from Sen. Fetterman, D-Pa., for honoring veterans ...

item.title: 'Squad' member claims State of the Union guest was arrested
item.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar's says her guest to President Donald Trump's State of the Union address was arrested by Capitol Police.

item.title: The Supreme Court Shows Its Work
item.description: The least democratic branch of the federal government is the most transparent.

item.title: Trump didn’t mention the $38.8 trillion national debt once in his State of the Union, but 90% of voters are worried
item.description: "Kitchen table cost-of-living issues" are top of mind right now, the Peterson Foundation says, and voters connect them to the spiralling national debt...

item.title: Judge orders Ilhan Omar attack suspect to remain in custody pending trial
item.description: A man accused of assaulting Rep. Ilhan Omar with apple cider vinegar at a Minneapolis town hall was ordered to remain in custody until trial.

item.title: Supreme Court litigator convicted of tax evasion
item.description: A Supreme Court litigator was found guilty this week of tax evasion and related charges stemming from his lifestyle as an ultra-high-stakes poker play...

item.title: Exclusive: Crypto trading platform raises $30 million from CMT Digital and Kraken
item.description: The fundraise for STS Digital, whose product is aimed at institutions, also included Arrington Capital and an investment arm of Fidelity.

item.title: CBS Sets Out to Debunk Trump, Ends Up Proving Him Right
item.description: The '60 Minutes' report fixates on a semantic issue while conceding the underlying reality of violence against white farmers in South Africa.

item.title: Senator opens inquiry into Binance over allegations it fired investigators who flagged that more than $1 billion flowed to Iranian entities
item.description: The probe comes after a Fortune investigation raised questions about the crypto firm’s compliance program.

item.title: Texas grand jury rejects indictments in fatal shooting of U.S. citizen by federal immigration agent
item.description: A grand jury on Wednesday rejected indictments over the fatal shooting last year of a U.S. citizen by a federal immigration agent during a traffic enc...

item.title: FBI fires agents who worked on Trump classified document investigation: Report
item.description: The FBI has fired additional agents who worked on an investigation into President Donald Trump, this time terminating employees who participated in th...

item.title: Hints of Spring
item.description: Time to build again.

item.title: AI Laws Need a Kill Switch
item.description: There is a better way to regulate this rapidly changing technology.

item.title: JP Morgan Chase Admits to Closing Trump’s Accounts After Capitol Riot
item.description: The key factor in this case, for Chase, is risk .

item.title: Detransitioner: ‘Gender-Affirming Care’ Was The Least Caring Thing Ever Done To Me
item.description: What saved me was not affirmation of untruth but affirmation of reality.

item.title: Striking Down Tariffs, SCOTUS Gives Congress Permission To Be Useless
item.description: The judges let Congress off the hook, further incentivizing the legislature’s dereliction while effectively usurping power from the political branches...

item.title: Yes, Celebrate the U.S. Men’s Hockey Team
item.description: Leftists can never put politics aside.

item.title: Lawyers say Pennsylvania student protesters did not know a man who joined scrum was the police chief
item.description: Lawyers for student protesters detained in Pennsylvania for four days after a scuffle with police say their clients had no idea the stocky older man i...

item.title: Justice Department says it's reviewing whether any Epstein-related records were mistakenly withheld
item.description: The Justice Department said Wednesday that it was looking into whether it improperly withheld documents from the Jeffrey Epstein files after several n...

item.title: Aligning Allocation to the Global Business Cycle
item.description: Static portfolios lag macro shifts. Predefined cycle triggers help practitioners adjust risk before markets reprice. The post Aligning Allocation to t...

item.title: Building Commitment to Long-Term Investing
item.description: Why clients stall on long-term investing and how reframing commitment around flexibility unlocks forward momentum. The post Building Commitment to Lon...

item.title: Why Static Portfolios Fail When Risk Regimes Change
item.description: Why static portfolio frameworks fail when risk regimes shift, drawing lessons from the very different market breakdowns of 2020 and 2022. The post Why...

item.title: What the Market Knows That WACC Doesn’t
item.description: Market-implied discount rates reveal how investors price risk, often diverging from WACC and reshaping capital decisions. The post What the Market Kno...

item.title: Attention Bias in AI-Driven Investing
item.description: AI tools may favor popular stocks over overlooked ones, embedding attention bias into investment decisions. The post Attention Bias in AI-Driven Inves...
